neck.title: 📱 Phone Neck — TCM Fixes What Stretching Can't
neck.first_dm:
Hey! Phone neck is one of the fastest-growing complaints I see — you're not alone 📱

Your 5-minute daily neck recovery routine:
• Neck roll with exhale: 5 slow circles each direction. Exhale on the way down — that's when the muscle releases.
• Fengchi (風池) point: base of skull, in the two hollows where neck meets skull. Press 60 seconds.
• Kudzu root (葛根) tea: drink once daily — specifically targets neck and upper back stiffness in TCM.

Is your pain more in the neck itself, the shoulders pulling down, or do you also get headaches from it?
neck.second_dm:
Your phone neck protocol is attached — the Fengchi point diagram is the part to screenshot 📲
Do the neck roll every morning before you pick up your phone. Game changer.
neck.infographic_brief:
Vertical infographic, 4:5 ratio, clean TCM anatomy aesthetic.

Subtitle: 'Unblock the Gallbladder & Bladder Meridians'
Background: clean white with warm beige border.

Protocol steps — numbered list:
1. 🔄 Neck roll with exhale — 5 circles each side, slow
2. 👆 Press Fengchi (風池) — 60 seconds, base of skull hollows [small diagram showing point location]
3. 🍵 Kudzu root tea (葛根茶) — 1 cup daily
4. 📱 Phone at eye level — raise your screen, not your head
5. ⏰ Every 45 min: look up + shoulder rolls x10

Bottom: 'Stagnation breaks with consistency. 5 min/day.'

eye.title: 👀 Dry Eyes from Screens? Your Liver Is Depleted
eye.first_dm:
Hey! The liver-eye connection is one of TCM's most underrated insights 👁️

Your screen-eye recovery protocol:
• Chrysanthemum + goji tea (菊花枸杞茶): drink every afternoon — afternoon is when Liver Qi starts to settle, not morning
• Jingming point (睛明): inner corner of each eye, beside the nose. Press gently 30 seconds each side.
• 20-20-20 with a twist: every 20 min, look 20 feet away for 20 seconds — then blink 10 times rapidly to reset tear film.

Do you also wake up between 1 and 3am? That's a key Liver Blood signal I want to check.
eye.second_dm:
Here's your screen-eye protocol — the Jingming point diagram is the key part 👁️
Start the chrysanthemum tea this week. Your eyes will feel different in 10 days.

tongue.title: 👅 Tongue Never Lies — 30-Second TCM Diagnosis
tongue.first_dm:
Hey! Tongue diagnosis is one of the most accurate tools in TCM — your tongue tells me more than a blood test in 30 seconds.

Quick check — what does YOUR tongue look like right now?
A) White coating (damp, gut sluggish)
B) Yellow coating (heat, inflammation)
C) Red tongue, thin coat (liver heat, poor sleep)
D) Pale tongue (blood deficiency, fatigue)

Tell me which one — I'll send you the exact remedy for your type 🌿
tongue.second_dm:
Here's your complete tongue diagnosis guide 👅

Based on what you described, here's your remedy:
• White coat → barley water every morning + cut ice-cold drinks
• Yellow coat → chrysanthemum tea + reduce fried and spicy food
• Red/thin coat → goji berries + red dates as an evening snack
• Pale tongue → red dates + longan + eat warm meals only (nothing cold)

Try your remedy for 3–5 days. The coating should start shifting. If it doesn't — there's usually a deeper root cause (liver, kidneys, chronic stress) that's worth a proper look.

Let me know how it goes 🌿
tongue.infographic_brief:
Vertical infographic, 4:5 ratio, warm TCM clinic aesthetic (cream background, terracotta + sage accents, clean sans-serif font).

Title: 'Your Tongue Never Lies'
Subtitle: '4 Coating Types — What Each One Means'

Four equal sections in a 2x2 grid:
1. WHITE COAT — Damp Cold | Gut sluggish, bloating, foggy mind after meals | Remedy: barley water + cut cold drinks
2. YELLOW COAT — Damp Heat | Inflammation, bad breath, constipation | Remedy: chrysanthemum tea + reduce fried/spicy
3. RED / THIN COAT — Liver Heat | Insomnia before 1am, dry eyes, irritability | Remedy: goji + red dates before bed
4. PALE TONGUE — Blood Deficiency | Fatigue, cold hands, anxiety, poor memory | Remedy: red dates + longan + warm meals only

Each section: flat tongue illustration icon, condition name, 3 bullet symptoms, 1 key remedy. Medical-safety footer: 'TCM guidance only — consult a licensed practitioner for persistent symptoms.' Warm, professional, Instagram-shareable.

immune.title: 🛡️ Never Get Sick — Strengthen Your Wei Qi
immune.first_dm:
Hey! Wei Qi is everything when it comes to not catching every cold 🛡️

Your quick Wei Qi protocol:
• Morning tea: Astragalus (黃耆) + Prince Ginseng (太子參) — simmer 20 min, drink before 9am
• Sleep before 11pm: Wei Qi rebuilds during deep sleep. Past midnight = Wei Qi drain.
• 20 min of sunlight daily: Lung Qi (which generates Wei Qi) needs sunlight to stay active

Tell me — do you get sick after every season change, or is it more like you're always tired and never feel 100%?

• No screens after 9pm: screen light aggravates Liver Yang and keeps the mind up
• 5 intentional sighs before bed: moves stuck Liver Qi, signals nervous system to downshift

cycle.title: 📅 The Week Before Your Period Determines Everything
cycle.first_dm:
Hey! The week before your period is genuinely the most important week — and most women miss it 📅

Your pre-period protection plan (Days 21–28):

Eat:
• 益母草 (Motherwort) tea — moves Qi and Blood gently, prevents stagnation
• 當歸 + 紅棗 (Dang gui + red dates) in warm soup — Blood nourishment 3x this week
• Everything warm. No raw vegetables, no ice, no cold drinks.

Avoid:
• Ice water, sashimi, anything cold
• Intense cardio (light walking only)
• Late nights past midnight
• Big arguments or emotional stress

Are you usually more crampy, more PMS-emotional, or more exhausted in that pre-period week?
cycle.second_dm:
Here's your pre-period protection plan — screenshot the DO/AVOID columns 📅
Start the motherwort tea on Day 21. That's all you need to do differently this week.

migraine.title: 🤯 Which Type of Migraine Do You Have?
migraine.first_dm:
Hey! Getting your migraine type right changes everything 🧠

Quick type check — which sounds most like you?
• Type 1 (Liver Yang Rising / 肝陽上亢): Throbbing, one side, worse when stressed, better lying in a dark room
• Type 2 (Blood Deficiency / 血虛): Dull, heavy, worse at end of day, comes with fatigue
• Type 3 (Phlegm-Damp / 痰濕): Heavy, foggy, often with nausea, worse in damp weather

Reply with your type (1, 2, or 3) and I'll send your specific protocol + the right tea to make this week.

period.title: 🩸 Period Pain Emergency — Do This Now
period.first_dm:
Hey! Let's get you some relief — but type ID first 🩸

Two quick questions:
1. Does a heat pack on your lower abdomen make the pain better or does it not really help?
   → Better = Cold Stagnation type
   → Doesn't help much = Blood Stasis type

2. Is the pain crampy and wave-like, or stabbing and fixed in one spot?

Tell me which, and I'll send the exact protocol for your type — including the right acupressure combo.

hormone.title: 🌙 Pre-Period Migraines — It's Your Liver-Kidney
hormone.first_dm:
Hey! That pre-period timing is SO specific and SO fixable in TCM 🌙

The key insight: you need to build Liver Blood in the 2 weeks AFTER your period ends, so there's enough to go around when it descends pre-period.

Your cycle-aware plan:
• Days 1–14 (after period): Goji + dang gui + ejiao soup, 3x per week — this is your Liver Blood building window
• Days 21–28 (before period): Sleep before 10:30pm. No alcohol. No cold food. Protect what you built.
• Day of migraine: Press Taichong (太衝) — between big and second toe, 60 seconds each side. Brings Liver Yang down.

Which week are you in right now?

3) ROOT RESET — plate icon; text: smaller warm meals, less greasy/spicy food, more bitter greens.
Footer: 'No improvement in 2 weeks? Check for reflux or sinus.' Flat icons, no photos.

teeth.title: 🦷 Yellow Teeth (Baking Soda + Banana Peel)
teeth.first_dm:
Hey! The banana-peel + baking soda trick is great for surface stains ✨

Quick check so I tailor it — is your yellowing more on the surface, or deep and grey-ish?
teeth.second_dm:
Here's your whitening guide — twice a week max so you protect the enamel 🦷

Want the kidney-support foods that strengthen teeth from inside? Reply 'kidney'.
teeth.infographic_brief:
Vertical infographic, 4:5 ratio, warm TCM clinic aesthetic.
Title: 'Yellow Teeth — Surface vs Inside'.
Three panels:
1) WHY — tooth icon; text: stains from food + the kidney/bone connection in TCM.
2) 2-MIN FIX — banana peel + baking soda icons; text: rub peel, brush with pinch of baking soda, 2x weekly only.
3) PROTECT — water icon; text: rinse after coffee/tea, limit baking soda to avoid enamel wear.
Footer: 'Sensitivity or deep discoloration? See a dentist.' Flat icons only.

tags.title: 🏷️ Skin Tags (Shrink Overnight with Castor Oil)
tags.first_dm:
Hey! The castor-oil method works — but skin tags love high blood sugar, so let's check the root 🍃

Quick q: do you have just a few tags, or clusters around the neck and underarms?
tags.second_dm:
Here's your skin-tag guide — patience is key, the oil works gradually 🌙

Want the blood-sugar food list that stops new tags forming? Reply 'sugar'.
tags.infographic_brief:
Vertical infographic, 4:5 ratio, warm TCM clinic aesthetic.
Title: 'Skin Tags — Surface Sign of an Inside Problem'.
Three panels:
1) WHAT THEY MEAN — neck/underarm icon; text: dampness, stagnation, often high blood sugar.
2) OVERNIGHT FIX — castor oil + plaster icon; text: dab pure castor oil morning + night, cover.
3) FIX THE INSIDE — plate icon; text: cut refined sugar, add cinnamon + bitter greens, move after meals.
Footer: 'Changing, bleeding, or fast-growing? See a doctor.' Flat icons only.
